checks.definition: CHECK (((status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'running'::character varying, 'completed'::character varying, 'failed'::character varying, 'canceled'::character varying])::text[])))

CHECK (((memory_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pricing_pattern'::character varying, 'vendor_behavior'::character varying, 'market_signal'::character varying, 'content_insight'::character varying, 'agent_performance'::character varying, 'security_pattern'::character varying, 'user_behavior'::character varying, 'prediction_result'::character varying])::text[])))
CHECK (((filter_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'approved'::character varying, 'rejected'::character varying, 'disputed'::character varying])::text[])))

CHECK (((rejection_category)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['unverified'::character varying, 'contradicts_existing'::character varying, 'low_confidence'::character varying, 'duplicate'::character varying, 'irrelevant'::character varying, 'potentially_false'::character varying])::text[])))
CHECK (((impact_level)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['low'::character varying, 'medium'::character varying, 'high'::character varying, 'critical'::character varying])::text[])))

CHECK (((filter_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'passed'::character varying, 'failed'::character varying, 'review'::character varying, 'approved'::character varying, 'rejected'::character varying])::text[])))
